accessibility.hint: Shows a short explanation for this field

workDetails.budgetCode: The unique budget reference code assigned to this work in the municipal records.
workDetails.workName: Enter the official work name approved for this project.
workDetails.budget: The sanctioned budget amount allocated for this work in the current financial year.
workDetails.financialYear: Select the government financial year (April–March) under which this work is booked.
workDetails.ward: The municipal ward where this work will be carried out.
workDetails.department: The PMC department responsible for executing this work.
workDetails.subDepartment: The sub-department or unit within the main department handling this work.
workDetails.officer: The nodal officer accountable for tracking and reporting on this work.
workDetails.officerMobile: Enter the contact mobile number of the officer responsible for this work.

pmcApproval.letterNumber: The official PMC letter reference number for this approval.
pmcApproval.letterDate: The date on the PMC approval letter.
pmcApproval.financeCommittee: Indicates whether finance committee approval is required before this work can proceed.
pmcApproval.approvalDate: The date when the finance committee granted approval.
pmcApproval.financeApprovalStatus: Current status of finance committee approval (e.g. approved, pending, rejected).

estimation.estimationDone: Mark yes when the departmental cost estimate has been prepared and approved.
estimation.estimationDate: The date when the cost estimate was finalised.
estimation.estimatedCost: The total estimated cost of the work as prepared by the department.
estimation.natureOfWorks: Brief description of the scope and nature of works covered by this estimate.

tenderCreation.tenderName: The title or name of the tender as published in the notice.
tenderCreation.tenderNumber: The official tender reference number assigned by PMC.
tenderCreation.advertisementDate: The date the tender was advertised in the newspaper or portal.
tenderCreation.tenderAmount: The amount quoted in the tender notice before contractor assignment.
tenderCreation.aPacketOpen: Whether the A packet (technical bid) has been opened.
tenderCreation.bPacketOpen: Whether the B packet (financial bid) has been opened.

reTender.enableRetender: Turn on if the original tender failed and a fresh tender is being issued.
reTender.previousRef: Reference number of the original tender that is being re-issued.
reTender.newDate: Date of the new tender advertisement or notice.
reTender.newAmount: Revised tender amount for the re-tendered work.
reTender.reason: Reason for re-tendering (e.g. no valid bids, cancelled tender).

contractorAssignment.contractorName: Full name of the contractor awarded the work.
contractorAssignment.contactMobile: Mobile number of the contractor's contact person.
contractorAssignment.percentAboveBelow: Whether the contractor's bid is above or below the estimate, and by what percentage.
contractorAssignment.finalTenderAmount: Final contract amount after applying the above/below percentage to the tender amount.

sanctionApproval.docketNumber: The official docket or file number under which sanction was granted.
sanctionApproval.sanctionDate: The date on the administrative sanction order.
sanctionApproval.sanctionAmount: The amount sanctioned for execution of this work.
sanctionApproval.sanctionAuthority: The officer or body that issued the sanction (e.g. Commissioner, Standing Committee).

workOrder.orderNumber: The official work order number issued to the contractor.
workOrder.startDate: The date on which work execution officially started on site.
workOrder.expectedCompletion: The target date by which the work is expected to be completed.
workOrder.notes: Any additional remarks about work commencement or site conditions.

workProgress.workCompletion: Mark yes when the physical work on site has been fully completed.
workProgress.siteNotes: On-site observations, progress updates, or issues noted during inspection.

paymentStatus.paymentReleased: Turn on when a payment installment has been released for this work.
paymentStatus.amountPaid: The amount paid in this installment (partial payments are allowed).
paymentStatus.paymentDate: The date when this payment installment was released.
paymentStatus.paymentHistory: This history shows only amount paid.

billSubmission.billSubmitted: Turn on when the contractor's bill has been submitted for payment.
billSubmission.billNumber: The bill or invoice reference number from the contractor.
billSubmission.billDate: The date on the submitted bill or invoice.
